# StreamableHttpServerOptions.IncludeForbiddenOriginBody property

When `true`, the `403` for a rejected `Origin` carries an id-less JSON-RPC error body; when `false` the body is omitted entirely (a bare `403`). Defaults to `true`. The body, when present, MUST carry no `id`. (R-9.11-c, R-9.7-a)

```csharp
public bool IncludeForbiddenOriginBody { get; set; }
```
